basic_details.job_title: BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 39 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Block Mission Management Unit Kanchipuram (BMMU Kanchipuram)
basic_details.short_information: Block Mission Management Unit Kanchipuram (BMMU Kanchipuram) Community Bank Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 39 vacancies have been announced through the BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have passed 12th Pass and are Woman SHG Members from Village Level Federation with required experience are eligible to apply for these Community Bank Coordinator vacancies. The offline application process for BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 is currently ongoing and w

qualification.details: Must be a woman SHG member from village level federation. Minimum 2 years experience as SHG motivator. 12th pass with good Tamil and English reading/writing and arithmetic skills. Must be resident of the concerned village panchayat. No NPA in SHG. Communication skills and banking transaction experience required. Preference for computer knowledge and two-wheeler driving license.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
